en: A PSALM OF DAVID. A SONG AT THE DEDICATION OF THE TEMPLE. I will extol you, O LORD, for you have drawn me up and have not let my foes rejoice over me.
zh: 耶和華啊！我要尊崇你，因為你曾救拔我， 不容我的仇敵向我誇耀。

en: O LORD my God, I cried to you for help, and you have healed me.
zh: 耶和華我的 神啊！ 我曾向你呼求， 你也醫治了我。

en: O LORD, you have brought up my soul from Sheol; you restored me to life from among those who go down to the pit.
zh: 耶和華啊！你曾把我從陰間救上來， 使我存活，不至於下坑。

en: Sing praises to the LORD, O you his saints, and give thanks to his holy name.
zh: 耶和華的聖民哪！你們要歌頌耶和華， 讚美他的聖名。

en: For his anger is but for a moment, and his favor is for a lifetime. Weeping may tarry for the night, but joy comes with the morning.
zh: 因為他的怒氣只是短暫的， 他的恩惠卻是一生一世的； 夜間雖然不斷有哭泣， 早晨卻必歡呼。

en: As for me, I said in my prosperity, "I shall never be moved."
zh: 至於我，我在安穩的時候曾說： “我必永不動搖。”

en: By your favor, O LORD, you made my mountain stand strong; you hid your face; I was dismayed.
zh: 耶和華啊！你的恩寵，使我堅立，如同大山； 你一掩面，我就驚惶。

en: To you, O LORD, I cry, and to the Lord I plead for mercy:
zh: 耶和華啊！我曾向你呼求； 我曾向我主懇求，說：

en: "What profit is there in my death, if I go down to the pit? Will the dust praise you? Will it tell of your faithfulness?
zh: “我被害流血，下到深坑，有甚麼益處呢？ 塵土還能稱讚你，還能傳揚你的信實嗎？

en: Hear, O LORD, and be merciful to me! O LORD, be my helper!"
zh: 耶和華啊！求你垂聽，恩待我； 耶和華啊！求你幫助我。”

en: You have turned for me my mourning into dancing; you have loosed my sackcloth and clothed me with gladness,
zh: 你已經把我的悲哀變為舞蹈， 把我的麻衣脫去，又給我穿上歡樂；

en: that my glory may sing your praise and not be silent. O LORD my God, I will give thanks to you forever!
zh: 好讓我的靈 歌頌你，永不停止。 耶和華我的 神啊！我要永遠稱讚你。
